steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The question explicitly asks which choice most effectively accomplishes the student's goal: identify the title of J.D. Salinger's first published short story. This goal is the decisive criterion for evaluating all four choices.

steps.title: Find which choice actually names the title
steps.content: Choice D directly names the title: “The Young Folks.” Choices A, B, and C mention related details—publication information, the author's reputation, or when it appeared—but none identify the title. That matches choice D — D is correct.
